name: Spaetzle (German Dumplings)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the eggs well.
2. Add flour, butter, milk, and salt to the beaten eggs. Mix until the dough is smooth but slightly thickened.
3. Drop spoonfuls of the dough into boiling, salted water using a wet teaspoon.
4. Cook the spaetzle in the boiling water until tender (about 15 minutes).
5. Drain the spaetzle and toss with melted butter.
6. Optional: Add sautéed onions for extra flavor. This makes a good substitute for potatoes.
